collections.title: Shop All
collections.seo_title: Personalized Jewelry & Meaningful Gifts | North & Pearl
collections.meta_description: Shop personalized jewelry and meaningful gifts from North & Pearl, including name necklaces, initial jewelry, birthstone-inspired pieces, bracelets, rings, earrings, and gift cards.
collections.description: Explore personalized jewelry designed for life's meaningful moments. Shop necklaces, bracelets, rings, earrings, gift cards, and gift-ready keepsakes for birthdays, anniversaries, mothers, bridesmaids, couples, and everyday gifting.

collections.title: Best Sellers
collections.seo_title: Best Selling Personalized Jewelry Gifts | North & Pearl
collections.meta_description: Discover North & Pearl best sellers: personalized jewelry gifts selected for birthdays, anniversaries, mothers, bridesmaids, couples, and meaningful everyday moments.
collections.description: Start with the pieces customers are most likely to love. This collection should feature the strongest personalized jewelry gifts once products and sales data are confirmed.

collections.title: Name Necklaces
collections.seo_title: Name Necklaces | Custom Personalized Necklaces | North & Pearl
collections.meta_description: Create a custom name necklace for birthdays, anniversaries, mothers, bridesmaids, partners, and meaningful self-gifting.
collections.description: Name necklaces turn a meaningful word, name, or memory into an everyday keepsake. Shop custom necklace concepts designed for gifting, milestones, and personal style.

collections.title: Initial Necklaces
collections.seo_title: Initial Necklaces | Personalized Initial Jewelry | North & Pearl
collections.meta_description: Shop initial necklaces made for subtle personalized style, birthdays, bridesmaids, partners, sisters, mothers, and everyday gifting.
collections.description: Initial necklaces offer a simple way to wear meaning every day. This collection should focus on refined, minimal personalization and easy giftability.

collections.title: Birthstone Jewelry
collections.seo_title: Birthstone Jewelry Gifts | Personalized Birth Month Jewelry | North & Pearl
collections.meta_description: Shop birthstone-inspired personalized jewelry gifts for birthdays, mothers, anniversaries, and milestone moments. Exact materials and stones pending confirmation.
collections.description: Birthstone-inspired jewelry helps connect a gift to a birthday, family story, or milestone. Exact stone and material details must be confirmed on each product before launch.

collections.title: Couple Jewelry
collections.seo_title: Personalized Couple Jewelry | Anniversary Gifts | North & Pearl
collections.meta_description: Shop personalized couple jewelry for anniversaries, names, dates, coordinates, and meaningful relationship gifts.
collections.description: Couple jewelry is built around names, dates, places, initials, and shared memories. Use this collection for anniversary and relationship gifting.

collections.title: Gifts
collections.seo_title: Personalized Jewelry Gifts for Her | North & Pearl
collections.meta_description: Find personalized jewelry gifts for birthdays, anniversaries, mothers, bridesmaids, partners, and meaningful occasions.
collections.description: Gift shopping should feel easy and thoughtful. This collection organizes North & Pearl pieces around recipient, occasion, and emotional meaning.

collections.title: Mother's Collection
collections.rule: Product tag contains mother-gift OR mothers-day
collections.seo_title: Personalized Jewelry Gifts for Mothers | North & Pearl
collections.meta_description: Shop personalized jewelry gifts for mothers, Mother's Day, new moms, family milestones, names, initials, and birthstone-inspired keepsakes.
collections.description: The Mother's Collection celebrates family meaning through personalized names, initials, and birthstone-inspired details. All material claims must remain product-specific and confirmed.

collections.title: Wedding & Bridesmaids
collections.rule: Product tag contains wedding OR bridesmaid-gift
collections.seo_title: Bridesmaid Jewelry Gifts | Wedding Keepsakes | North & Pearl
collections.meta_description: Shop personalized bridesmaid jewelry gifts, wedding keepsakes, maid of honor gifts, and thoughtful bridal party pieces.
collections.description: Wedding and bridesmaid jewelry should feel coordinated, personal, and gift-ready. Use this collection for bridal party thank-you gifts and meaningful wedding keepsakes.

collections.title: Gift Cards
collections.seo_title: North & Pearl Gift Cards | Personalized Jewelry Gifts
collections.meta_description: Give a North & Pearl digital gift card so they can choose a personalized jewelry piece made for their meaningful moment.
collections.description: Gift cards help customers give meaning while letting the recipient choose the piece, style, and personalization they love most.
